productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid White Jacket
description: Composition White jacket with the shell made of 100% cotton and the trim made of 97% polyester and 3% elastane, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar, zippered front placket, appliqué d branding on left chest, two pockets on the sides, black striping on the collar, cuffs, and hem, and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print This jacket from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
